title: Implant Equipment Associate/ Senior Associate Engineer
description:
SSMC (Systems on Silicon Manufacturing Company Pte. Ltd.) is a Joint Venture between NXP and TSMC. We offer flexible and cost-effective semiconductor fabrication solutions by maintaining fully equipped SMIF cleanroom environment, 100% equipment automation and proven wafer-manufacturing processes.

We're looking for innovative, passionate, and talented people like you to join our team.

We’re searching for an Associate/ Senior Associate Engineer to be part of our Diffusion (Implant) Department diverse team of talent.

What you will be working on:

  • To assist the Engineers to improve and sustain equipment performance and Cpk indices to meet operations goals

  • Perform 12-hour shift duties to support the running of Production in the Module and ensure equipment readiness and worthiness for production

  • Perform scheduled preventive maintenance (PM) and calibration on a timely basis

  • Assist Engineers in the installation and hook-up of new equipment

  • Trouble-shoot equipment-related issues and minimize equipment downtime

  • Assist in implementing process improvement projects

  • Assist new Associate Engineers on their On-The-Job-Training (OJT) by acting as their buddy

  • Participate in QIT programs to improve productivity and output quality of the Module, and constantly monitor and feedback to Engineers to improve performance of equipment to meet Module objectives

  • Maintain good housekeeping in the production area, ensuring good safety practice and safe custody of tools, equipment and other properties belonging to the Module

More about you:

  • Diploma / ITC / NTC in Electrical / Electronics / Mechatronics / Mechanical/ Microelectronics / Chemical Process Technology

  • At least 2 - 5 years working experience in electrical / electronics industry for Associate Engineer Position

  • Fresh diploma holders will also be considered

  • Able to perform 12-hour rotating shift

  • Team Player

SSMC is firmly committed to upholding equal employment opportunities for all individuals. We strictly adhere to the Tripartite Guidelines on Fair Employment Practices (TGFEP), the Singapore Food Safety and Security Act 2025 (FSSA 2025), and the Singapore Code of Advertising Practice. All qualified applicants will receive non-discriminatory consideration for employment on the basis of merit and regardless of age, race, gender, religion, marital status and family responsibilities, or disability, or any other attributes as protected by the relevant laws.
